title: How I Auto Track AI Agent Actions and Token Usage (n8n tutorial)

extracted.hook: LLM observability is such a big deal when we're talking about AI agents because unlike traditional software, these systems can be a little bit unpredictable. They can hallucinate and they can become expensive, especially at scale. So, it's important to monitor their usage.
